name: Oven Fried White Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, cornmeal, parmesan cheese, and Cajun spice.
2. Dredge each fish fillet in the mixture, coating both sides evenly.
3. Spray an oven-safe pan with Pam cooking spray.
4. Arrange the dredged fish fillets in the pan.
5. Drizzle with oil.
6. Bake at 450°F for 8-10 minutes per side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Note: This recipe yields approximately 1 serving (2 patty, 1/4 block, 1/2 fat, 23 calories).
